name: follow-up-boss-pp-mcp
description: Follow Up Boss API surface as MCP tools.

fub_api_key.title: FUB_API_KEY
fub_api_key.description: Sets FUB_API_KEY for the Follow Up Boss MCP server. Get a credential from https://docs.followupboss.com/reference/authentication.

fub_system.title: FUB_SYSTEM
fub_system.description: Optional Follow Up Boss integration system name sent as X-System.

fub_system_key.title: FUB_SYSTEM_KEY
fub_system_key.description: Optional Follow Up Boss integration system key sent as X-System-Key.
